userText: One of the advantages of learn English is that can raise my brain ability.
correctedText: One of the advantages of learning English is that it can improve my thinking ability.
generalAdvice: 你已经抓住了 one of the advantages of ... is ... 这个骨架。下一步重点是介词后接动名词，以及更自然的能力表达。

issues.note: of 后面这里不能直接接动词原形 learn，要改成 learning。
issues.suggestion: 记住介词后常接名词或动名词：of learning English, by reading more, for improving writing。

issues.note: is that can raise... 缺少形式主语 it，更完整的是 is that it can ...。
issues.suggestion: 用 is that it can ... 这个小骨架来稳住后半句。

issues.note: raise my brain ability 不自然。这里更自然的是 improve my thinking ability 或 improve my English ability。
issues.suggestion: 表达能力提升时，优先用 improve my ... ability / skills。
